title: Irresistible Love escape roll ends effect and sends card to cemetery

card.rawText: Your opponent cannot inflict damage or play magic cards. During each player's turn, your opponent may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-3, this effect ends and this card is sent to your cemetery.

effect.value: On 1-3 effect ends and this card goes to your cemetery

plan.title: Irresistible Love escape roll ends effect and sends card to cemetery
plan.summary: With Irresistible Love active, force the opponent escape roll to 1 and verify the effect ends and the field card goes to its controller cemetery.

notes: Pre-place Irresistible Love as active field magic for player_1.
During each player turn, opponent may roll 1 die; 1-3 ends this effect and sends this card to your cemetery.

steps: Resolve the forced escape roll as 1.
Verify the field effect ends and Irresistible Love is sent to player_1 cemetery.

expectedAssertions.label: Irresistible Love leaves the field after successful escape roll
Irresistible Love is sent to its controller cemetery

manualVerification: A failed 4-6 roll should leave both restrictions active.
riskNotes: This fixture requires field-card escape cleanup, not just status application.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_039_irresistible_love-039-e03 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
